leadText: Scrafty (Japanese: ズルズキン Zuruzukin) is a dual-type Dark/Fighting Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Scraggy starting at level 39. Scrafty can Mega Evolve into Mega Scrafty using the Scraftinite. Mega Scrafty was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Scrafty wearing its skin as a hood Scrafty is a bipedal, lizard-like Pokémon . It has oval, wide-set eyes with small pupils and gray eyelids, as well as small nostrils and a wide mouth with bared teeth, giving it the appearance of a permanent sneer. It sports a red crest on its head, similar in appearance to a mohawk. Baggy yellow skin hangs off its shoulders, falling halfway down its back. As shown in the animated series , it can wear this skin like a hood. Scrafty's body is orange, with thin arms and a gray, scaled belly. Its lower body and tail are covered by loose yellow skin resembling baggy trousers. On its tail is a single red scale. Scrafty is powerful enough to kick through concrete blocks used by Conkeldurr , and can also spit acidic liquid from its mouth, which it does to taunt opponents. It can protect itself while attacking by pulling up or folding the loose skin around its waist. Scrafty lives in groups with other members of its species. Groups determine hierarchy by crest size, with the Scrafty having the largest crest becoming the leader. The larger the crest, the more arrogantly Scrafty acts. A group will attack anything that comes within its territory. Scrafty never leaves its territory for a long time. Though often coming off as rude, it takes good care of its loved ones and its turf. Scrafty never leaves the territory it watches over its whole life long. Forms [ edit | edit source ] Scrafty can Mega Evolve into Mega Scrafty. The shed skins of Mega Scrafty turn from a yellowish color to pure white thanks to Mega Evolution, which also causes the skins to toughen and become more resilient. The shed skins are worn by Mega Scrafty in two parts. The top part is worn over its head and shoulders akin to a hoodie, which splits into multiple trailing strips at the back. The hood retains the eye holes present in its base form, but it is not seen using it to cover its face. The backside of Mega Scrafty's crest sticks out of the skin, resembling a ponytail. The bottom part is worn by Mega Scrafty like a pair of pants, now including V-shaped holes on the knees; unlike regular Scrafty, Mega Scrafty's "pants" do not cover its tail. Mega Scrafty also adopts a slouching, imposing stance in battle, cracking its neck when it Mega Evolves. It remains as feisty as ever. Mega Scrafty Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Scrafty evolves from Scraggy . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Scraggy Dark Fighting → First Evolution Scrafty Dark Fighting

Ultra Sun This Pokémon may be rude, but it takes very good care of its family, its friends, and its turf. Ultra Moon It taunts its opponents by spitting. It has a certain territory that it never leaves its whole life long. Generation VIII Galar #225 Isle of Armor #162 Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword As halfhearted as this Pokémon's kicks may seem, they pack enough power to shatter Conkeldurr's concrete pillars. Shield While mostly known for having the temperament of an aggressive ruffian, this Pokémon takes very good care of its family, friends, and territory. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #— Blueberry #122 Lumiose #185 Hyperspace #— Scarlet Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth. Violet This Pokémon may be rude, but it takes very good care of its family, its friends, and its turf. Legends: Z-A It pulls up its shed skin to protect itself while it kicks. The bigger the crest, the more arrogantly it behaves. Mega Scrafty Legends: Z-A Mega Evolution has caused Scrafty's shed skin to turn white, growing tough and supple. Of course, this Pokémon is still as feisty as ever. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW043 Scrafty Ash's Pokédex Scrafty, the Hoodlum Pokémon and the evolved form of Scraggy. Scrafty can use its powerful kicks to smash through concrete blocks. To protect itself, Scrafty can fold its loose skin around its waist.
